chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reasons Behind Hajj

text: 2113 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ سُمِّيَ اَلْعَتِيقَ لِأَنَّهُ بَيْتٌ عَتِيقٌ مِنَ اَلنَّاسِ وَ لَمْ يَمْلِكْهُ أَحَدٌ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2113 - It is narrated:
"It was named al-Atiq (the Ancient) because it is a house independent of people and has never been owned by anyone."
